title: Royal net
note: A protected queen can finish the job cleanly.

title: Corner box
note: Use the king to take away the escape squares.

title: Back-rank curtain
note: The queen closes the last file.

title: Scholar's finish
note: The attack has already done its work: find the finishing capture.

title: The exposed diagonal
note: When the diagonal is opened, do not send a committee.

title: Queen left unattended
note: Development comes with a small administrative benefit: free queens.

title: Precision finish
note: Confirm every flight square before committing.

title: King and queen geometry
note: A small board position; no small consequences.

title: Last rank
note: The final square matters rather more than the journey.
